'''鈭歮-h-g''' ('''kamahag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaternize|quaternize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaternize|quaternize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歮-h-g
|-
! Lemma
| kamahag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimahag|thimahag]] || [[word:jimahag|jimahag]] || [[word:shimahag|shimahag]] || [[word:kimahag|kimahag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumahag|thuthumahag]] || [[word:jujumahag|jujumahag]] || [[word:shushumahag|shushumahag]] || [[word:kukumahag|kukumahag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumahag|thumahag]] || [[word:jumahag|jumahag]] || [[word:shumahag|shumahag]] || [[word:kumahag|kumahag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumahag|thumahag]] || [[word:jumahag|jumahag]] || [[word:shumahag|shumahag]] || [[word:kumahag|kumahag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themahag|themahag]] || [[word:jemahag|jemahag]] || [[word:shemahag|shemahag]] || [[word:kemahag|kemahag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomahag|thothomahag]] || [[word:jojomahag|jojomahag]] || [[word:shoshomahag|shoshomahag]] || [[word:kokomahag|kokomahag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomahag|thomahag]] || [[word:jomahag|jomahag]] || [[word:shomahag|shomahag]] || [[word:komahag|komahag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomahag|thomahag]] || [[word:jomahag|jomahag]] || [[word:shomahag|shomahag]] || [[word:komahag|komahag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙mahag|th忙mahag]] || [[word:j忙mahag|j忙mahag]] || [[word:sh忙mahag|sh忙mahag]] || [[word:k忙mahag|k忙mahag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamahag|thathamahag]] || [[word:jajamahag|jajamahag]] || [[word:shashamahag|shashamahag]] || [[word:kakamahag|kakamahag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamahag|thamahag]] || [[word:jamahag|jamahag]] || [[word:shamahag|shamahag]] || [[word:kamahag|kamahag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamahag|thamahag]] || [[word:jamahag|jamahag]] || [[word:shamahag|shamahag]] || [[word:kamahag|kamahag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamahag|shamahag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamahag|goshamahag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamahag|gokishamahag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamahagn眉|shamahagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamahagnkn眉|goshamahagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahagn眉|gokishamahagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamahagsh毛|shamahagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamahagnksh毛|goshamahagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamahagsh毛|gokishamahagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahagro|shamahagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahagnkro|goshamahagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahagro|gokishamahagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahagmu|shamahagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahagnkmu|goshamahagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahagmu|gokishamahagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamahagsher|shamahagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamahagnksher|goshamahagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamahagsher|gokishamahagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamahagng|shamahagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamahagnkng|goshamahagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamahagng|gokishamahagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamahagya|shamahagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamahagnkya|goshamahagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamahagya|gokishamahagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamahagyam|shamahagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamahagnkyam|goshamahagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamahagyam|gokishamahagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahagn眉sh毛|shamahagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahagnkn眉sh毛|goshamahagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahagn眉sh毛|gokishamahagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahagn眉ro|shamahagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahagnkn眉ro|goshamahagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahagn眉ro|gokishamahagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahagn眉mu|shamahagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahagnkn眉mu|goshamahagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahagn眉mu|gokishamahagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahagsh毛n眉|shamahagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahagnksh毛n眉|goshamahagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahagsh毛n眉|gokishamahagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahagsh毛ro|shamahagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahagnksh毛ro|goshamahagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahagsh毛ro|gokishamahagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahagsh毛mu|shamahagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahagnksh毛mu|goshamahagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahagsh毛mu|gokishamahagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahagron眉|shamahagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahagnkron眉|goshamahagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahagron眉|gokishamahagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahagrosh毛|shamahagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahagnkrosh毛|goshamahagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahagrosh毛|gokishamahagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamahagromu|shamahagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamahagnkromu|goshamahagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamahagromu|gokishamahagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamahagmun眉|shamahagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamahagnkmun眉|goshamahagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamahagmun眉|gokishamahagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamahagmush毛|shamahagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamahagnkmush毛|goshamahagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamahagmush毛|gokishamahagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamahagmuro|shamahagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamahagnkmuro|goshamahagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamahagmuro|gokishamahagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
